evals.name: validate-deontic-completeness
evals.prompt: Write a Python function that validates V-001 (Deontic Completeness). A concept with constraint_deontic of SHALL or SHALL_NOT must have at least one applicable_occupancy_group. If it doesn't, return a RuleResult with passed=False and an appropriate error message.
evals.expected_output: A function that returns a RuleResult for V-001 validation
expectations: Function checks if constraint_deontic is SHALL or SHALL_NOT
Function checks if applicable_occupancy_groups has at least one entry
Returns RuleResult with passed=False if validation fails
Returns RuleResult with passed=True if validation passes

evals.name: assign-risk-tier
evals.prompt: Write a function that assigns a risk tier (1-4) to a concept based on its source section and properties. Tier 1 is for fire/egress/structural/accessibility. Tier 4 is for scope/definitions. Default is Tier 3.
evals.expected_output: A function that returns an integer risk tier
expectations: Returns 1 for SHALL/SHALL_NOT with occupancy groups

evals.name: validate-fire-rating-monotonicity
evals.prompt: Write a function that validates V-002 (Fire Rating Monotonicity). A subclass must have a fire resistance rating greater than or equal to its parent. The concept and parent both have minimumFireResistanceRating properties.
evals.expected_output: A function that validates fire rating inheritance
expectations: Compares child and parent fire ratings
Returns passed=False if child rating < parent rating
Returns passed=True if child rating >= parent rating

evals.name: check-ifc-namespace
evals.prompt: Write a function that checks V-006 (IFC Namespace Isolation). A concept IRI must not start with any IFC namespace prefix like 'https://standards.buildingsmart.org/IFC/'.
evals.expected_output: A function that validates IRI doesn't use IFC namespace
expectations: Returns passed=False if IRI starts with IFC prefix
Includes appropriate error message about V-006 violation

evals.name: validate-alignment-confidence
evals.prompt: Write a function that validates V-014 (Alignment Strength Gate). For skos:exactMatch, confidence must be >= 0.90. For owl:equivalentClass, confidence must be >= 0.95.
evals.expected_output: A function that validates alignment confidence thresholds
expectations: Returns passed=False if thresholds not met
